task_snapshots.title: 334b-01: Cost aggregation API endpoints
task_snapshots.description:
[subtask of eb03f5696c69]

## Task
Create/update cost data API endpoints in src/bernstein/core/routes/costs.py

## Requirements
- GET /costs — aggregate costs by (per-agent, per-model, run-total)
- Calculate cost attainment: (spent / budget) * 100
- Include latest cost data from all sources
- Handle missing/empty budget (avoid division by zero)

## Completion
✓ Endpoints handle all cost dimensions
✓ Attainment calculation correct
✓ Returns JSON with timestamp for staleness detection
